languages.text: "Что? К-как... вы к нам хотите? Конечно же, Лорд-капитан! Большую честь нам оказываете! А ну-ка, солдатня, освободите место {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости!"
"What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
languages.original_text: "Что? К-как... вы к нам хотите? Конечно же, Лорд-капитан! Большую честь нам оказываете! А ну-ка, солдатня, освободите место {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости!"

traits.locale_text: "What? H-how... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
"What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
{n}As soon as the Merovians realise that you are accepting their challenge, they erupt into approving shouts and whooping.{/n}
"What? H-how... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"
"What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

languages.text: {n}メロヴィン人たちは、あなたが彼らの挑戦を受け入れたと気づくと、歓声と歓喜の声をあげた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the Merovians realise that you are accepting their challenge, they erupt into approving shouts and whooping.{/n}

languages.text: "Ne? Bize katılmak mı istiyorsunuz? Elbette Lord Kaptan! Bize büyük bir onur bahşediyorsunuz! Sizler, boşaltın burayı! {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ne yer açın!"
languages.original_text: "What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: "Ne? Bize katılmak mı istiyorsunuz? Elbette Lord Kaptan! Bize büyük bir onur bahşediyorsunuz! Sizler, boşaltın burayı! {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ne yer açın!"

languages.text: “什么？您……您想跟我们一起练？当然可以了，舰长大人！您真是太给我们面子了！你们几个，让开！给大人腾地方！”
languages.original_text: "What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: “什么？您……您想跟我们一起练？当然可以了，舰长大人！您真是太给我们面子了！你们几个，让开！给大人腾地方！”

languages.text: "Was? I... Ihr wollt Euch uns anschließen? Aber natürlich, Lord Captain. Das ist uns eine große Ehre! Ihr da, verschwindet! Macht Platz für {mf|Seine|Ihre} {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"
languages.original_text: "What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: "Was? I... Ihr wollt Euch uns anschließen? Aber natürlich, Lord Captain. Das ist uns eine große Ehre! Ihr da, verschwindet! Macht Platz für {mf|Seine|Ihre} {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"

languages.text: « Quoi ? Vous... vous voulez vous joindre à nous ! Mais bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! C'est un grand honneur ! Que tout le monde libère le terrain ! Laissez la place à Sa Seigneurie ! »
languages.original_text: "What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: « Quoi ? Vous... vous voulez vous joindre à nous ! Mais bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! C'est un grand honneur ! Que tout le monde libère le terrain ! Laissez la place à Sa Seigneurie ! »

languages.text: «¿Qué? ¿D-de...? ¿Desea unirse a nosotros? ¡Por supuestísimo, Lord Capitán! ¡Es un gran honor! ¡Apartaos, chusma! ¡Abrid paso a su señoría!».
languages.original_text: "What? Y-you... you wish to join us? But of course, Lord Captain! You do us a great honour! You lot, clear out! Make room for {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué? ¿D-de...? ¿Desea unirse a nosotros? ¡Por supuestísimo, Lord Capitán! ¡Es un gran honor! ¡Apartaos, chusma! ¡Abrid paso a su señoría!».
